docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION ONLY. (TRANSACTION ID # 57874387)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-27-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-16-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
